song.title: Sports Camp Song
song.lyrics:
[v1] Sports camp, it's where we meet God and play, I say Sports camp, we have fun everyeday, I say Sports camp, we meet new friends all the way So let's talk some more about it
[v2] B-ball, we learned to lay-up and shoot, and then Soccer, we learned to give it a boot, but wait Frisbee, we play as long as there's light So let's celebrate about it
[C] (We want to tell you that) We Love Sports Camp (We want to tell you that) We Love Sports Camp So come and join us to play, for you we'll always make way We'll work together, throughout the whole day (x2)
[v3] V-ball, we learned to bump, set, and spike, I say Football, hut hut hut hut hut hut hike Jesus, He's our love and our light We just love to talk about it
